overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player ascends through a covered alleyway, crosses an open plaza, traverses a narrow corridor with holographic displays, and enters a pachinko parlor filled with gaming machines and patrons.

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs through a narrow neon-lit covered alley

entered.detail: large curved neon sign with stylized lettering mounted on the left wall
large screen displaying animated holographic advertisements
wide concrete stairs leading upward through the alley
pink neon-lit structural arch on the right side
red paper lantern hanging above the stairway in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered alleyway with wet concrete stairs leading upward. Neon signs including a prominent sex shop sign and pink archway illuminate the walls, while a red Chinese lantern hangs in the distance. The space is enclosed with no sky visible, and no pedestrians are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with commercial storefronts

events.description: exits covered stairway into open urban plaza with visible sky between buildings
turns left into narrow side alleyway

agents.ego_description: moving through the open plaza area with neon signs, then turning left into a passage

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with illuminated windows and neon signage
neon sign reading SFX SHOP in pink letters
low concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered alley, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza with partial sky visibility. The camera passes a graffiti-covered concrete barrier and turns left, moving past commercial buildings with neon signage including an SFX shop. The red lantern from the previous segment is now closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with holographic displays

events.description: enters narrow corridor lined with holographic mannequin displays
pedestrian in green jacket passes close to the camera

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage with illuminated mannequin displays on the left wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a green jacket and dark pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large screens showing holographic human mannequins in various poses
wall covered in blue and white graffiti tags
tall vending machine with illuminated interface
red paper lantern hanging in the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow enclosed alleyway lined with holographic mannequin displays on the left and graffiti-covered walls on the right. A pedestrian in a green jacket walks toward and passes the camera. The space is dimly lit with neon accents, and a vending machine is visible in the distance.

events.description: approaches the entrance to Wakako's Pachinko Parlor
enters building, lighting shifts from outdoor neon to purple and blue interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the doorway into the pachinko parlor

notable_agents.action: person entering the parlor doorway ahead of the camera

entered.detail: arched doorway with metal frame leading into the establishment
red upholstered armchair placed outside the entrance
ornate wall-mounted lantern with paper panels

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the entrance to a pachinko parlor, passing a red outdoor chair and traditional wall lantern. After entering through the arched doorway, the lighting shifts dramatically to purple and blue interior neon. A vending machine that was distant is now nearby on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pachinko parlor interior with gaming floor

events.description: moves deeper into the pachinko parlor main gaming floor
approaches back corridor where lighting becomes darker and more red-toned

agents.ego_description: walking through the parlor observing patrons playing at pachinko machines

notable_agents.action: man in purple shirt sitting and playing pachinko machine
man in vest standing and playing pachinko machine

entered.detail: row of illuminated pachinko machines with digital displays
row of pachinko machines with colorful glowing interfaces
large rotating ceiling fan with lights
screen displaying political message about the 2nd amendment
counter with staff behind it at the back of the room
metal mesh gate blocking the back corridor

segments.scene_description: Inside the pachinko parlor, rows of glowing gaming machines line both sides of a tiled walkway. Patrons are engaged with the machines while neon purple and blue lighting illuminates the space. The camera moves toward the back of the room past a service counter, approaching a metal security gate where the lighting shifts to a darker red tone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a wide urban plaza before narrowing again into a holographic corridor. It begins by ascending wet concrete stairs within a covered alley, where pink archways and a distant red lantern illuminate the enclosed space. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a broad plaza under a partial sky, passing graffiti-covered barriers and commercial signage. The scene then shifts back into a narrow passage, moving past glowing holographic mannequins and a pedestrian in a green jacket. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this dimly lit corridor, passing graffiti-covered walls toward a distant vending machine.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a traditional outdoor entryway into the neon-saturated interior of a bustling pachinko parlor. It begins by approaching the parlor's entrance, passing a red outdoor chair and a wall lantern before crossing through an arched doorway. As the camera enters, the lighting shifts dramatically from the exterior gloom to vibrant purple and blue neon, bringing a nearby vending machine into clear view on the left. The scene then expands into the main hall, gliding down a tiled walkway lined with glowing gaming machines and engaged patrons. Finally, the camera moves past a service counter toward the back of the room, where the cool tones give way to a darker red glow near a metal security gate.
